body: Constant Story "${1:Game Title}";
Constant Headline "^${2:A game by Author}^";
Include "Parser";
Include "VerbLib";
Object ${3:TheRoom} "${4:Room Name}"
with
description "${5:Description.}",
has light;
[ Initialise ;
location = ${3:TheRoom};
Include "Grammar";
Game skeleton.description: New game skeleton (Includes, starting room, Initialise)

body: Object ${1:Name} "${2:short name}"
with
${3:description} ${0},
Class ${1:Name}
with
${2:property} ${0},
[ ${1:name} ${2:args} ;
Verb '${1:word}'
* ${2:noun} -> ${3:Action}
!! Influence parser's object disambiguation.
!! code=0: filter (return 0 to exclude, 1 to allow);
!! code=1: accept a single-object match? (return 0 or 1);
!! code=2: rank (return 0-9, higher = preferred).
[ ChooseObjects obj code ;
ChooseObjects.description: Entry point: influence parser's object disambiguation (code: 0=filter, 1=accept?, 2=rank)

body: !! Custom noun-parsing for obj. Called when the parser tries to match
!! words to obj. Return the number of words matched, or -1 to fall
!! through to the default name-matching algorithm.
[ ParseNoun obj ;
ParseNoun.description: Entry point: custom noun parsing for obj, return number of words matched or -1

body: !! Override parser error messages. error_type is one of the CANTSEE_PE,
!! TOOLIT_PE, etc. constants. Print a replacement message and return
!! true to suppress the default, or return false to let it print.
[ ParserError error_type ;
ParserError.description: Entry point: override parser error messages, return true to suppress default

body: !! Print a custom verb name for trace output and the ACTIONS debugging
!! command. verb is the dictionary word. Return true if handled.
[ PrintVerb verb ;
PrintVerb.description: Entry point: print custom verb name in action traces, return true if handled

body: !! Handle an unrecognised verb. word is the dictionary value of what
!! the player typed. Return a dictionary verb word to redirect to,
!! or false to let the parser print its error.
[ UnknownVerb word ;
UnknownVerb.description: Entry point: handle unrecognised verb, return a verb word or false

body: !! Add extra objects to scope for the given actor. Call
!! PlaceInScope(obj) for each object to add. Return false
!! to also include the default scope, or true to replace it.
[ InScope actor ;
InScope.description: Entry point: add extra objects to scope via PlaceInScope()

body: !! Runs before each action, after before rules on the noun but
!! before the action's main routine. Return true to block the action.
[ GamePreRoutine ;
GamePreRoutine.description: Entry point: runs before each action, return true to block

body: !! Runs after each action completes (after the action routine and
!! after rules). Return value is ignored.
[ GamePostRoutine ;
GamePostRoutine.description: Entry point: runs after each action

body: !! Runs when the player dies (deadflag becomes nonzero). Return true
!! to resurrect the player (reset deadflag to 0 first).
[ AfterLife ;
AfterLife.description: Entry point: runs when player dies, return true to resurrect

body: !! Runs when the player moves from one dark room to another.
!! Conventionally used to kill the player ("you fall into a pit").
[ DarkToDark ;
DarkToDark.description: Entry point: runs when player moves from one dark room to another

body: !! Runs each time the player enters a new room, after the room
!! description is printed. Useful for triggering events on arrival.
[ NewRoom ;
NewRoom.description: Entry point: runs each time the player enters a new room

body: !! Runs each turn after action processing. Use for daemons, timed
!! events, or anything that should happen every turn regardless
!! of what the player does.
[ TimePasses ;
TimePasses.description: Entry point: runs each turn after action processing

body: !! Print the name of scored task number task (0-based) for the
!! FULL SCORE verb. Called once per achieved task.
[ PrintTaskName task ;
PrintTaskName.description: Entry point: print the name of a scored task

body: !! Display amusing things to try after the player wins. Called
!! when the player answers YES to "Would you like to see some
!! suggestions for amusing things to do?"
[ Amusing ;
Amusing.description: Entry point: display amusing things to try after winning

body: !! Print custom death messages. Called when deadflag > 2;
!! print the message corresponding to the deadflag value.
!! (deadflag=1 is ~You have died~, 2 is ~You have won~.)
[ DeathMessage ;
DeathMessage.description: Entry point: print custom death messages for deadflag values > 2

body: !! Custom capacity check. Called when the player tries to put item
!! into receiver and the default capacity check fails. Print a
!! custom message and return true to block, or false for the default.
[ ObjectDoesNotFit item receiver ;
ObjectDoesNotFit.description: Entry point: custom capacity check, return true to block and print message

body: !! Parse a custom number format. buf is the text buffer, len is
!! the word length. Return the parsed value, or 0 to fall through
!! to the default number parser.
[ ParseNumber buf len ;
ParseNumber.description: Entry point: parse a custom number format, return value or 0 to fall through
